reviews.review_description:
Though I can enjoy this developers other games enough, this one is literally unplayable...
The block already doesn't quite move smoothly or fast enough, but what kills it is the "flip". I press A, and it may flip to the top maybe once, but then in the heat of the moment it'll stay stuck to the ground, getting me hit snd ending the freakin' game forthe38th time in 5 minutes...
So even at budget price, I have to say thiswas a waste of money. It's a good idea that just needs a few tweaks and a lot of polish..
